revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Bio Planet | Guid=3035-8152 | Deck=The '''Bio Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Leonardo is fought. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The '''Bio Planet''' is a fictional planet appearing in the the Sega Mega Drive–Genesis version of Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Tournament Fighters. Located in Dimension X, it is where Clone Leonardo is fought.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Blacksburg | Guid=3035-8277 | Deck=A city in Virginia and the home of Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Virginia_Tech_Hokies | Objects= | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Virginia | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3613791-screenshot2024-08-16at9.23.42%E2%80%AFpm.png}}

{{Location | Name=Bone County | Guid=3035-8394 | Deck=Bone County is the desert region spanning the northern and northeastern portions of San Andreas in Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas. It is bordered by the city of Las Venturas to the east, Tierra Robada to the west, and Red County to the south. | Characters=Characters/Barbara_Schternvart,Characters/Carl_Johnson,Characters/Mike_Toreno,Characters/The_Truth | Concepts= | Objects=Objects/Dune,Objects/Dune_Buggy,Objects/Electrical_Substation,Objects/Pumpjack,Objects/Sand,Objects/Sandking | Locations=Locations/Area_69,Locations/Dam,Locations/Desert,Locations/Farm,Locations/Quarry,Locations/Rural_Area,Locations/San_Andreas | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3810012-0783540872-latest.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3810012-0783540872-latest.jpg","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,scale_small,scale_medium,square_avatar,square_small,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Bone County is the desert region spanning the northern and northeastern portions of San Andreas in Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas. It is bordered by the city of Las Venturas to the east, Tierra Robada to the west, and Red County to the south.

{{Location | Name=Bretonnia | Guid=3035-8134 | Deck=A land of chivalry and the knightly orders who nominally adhere to them, Bretonnia is one of the kingdoms of the Old World in the Warhammer Fantasy setting. It is based off of both Medieval France and Arthurian legend. | Characters=Characters/Louen_Leoncoeur,Characters/Repanse_de_Lyonesse,Characters/The_Fay_Enchantress,Characters/The_Green_Knight,Characters/The_Red_Duke,Characters/Tristan_de_la_Tour | Concepts=Concepts/Beastmen,Concepts/Black_Grail_Knight,Concepts/Chaos,Concepts/Dragon_Slayer,Concepts/Feudalism,Concepts/Grail_Knight,Concepts/Hippogryph,Concepts/Knight,Concepts/Mounted_Combat,Concepts/Orc,Concepts/Peasants,Concepts/Pegasus,Concepts/Religion,Concepts/Religious_Themes,Concepts/Undead,Concepts/Vampire,Concepts/Vampire_Knight,Concepts/War,Concepts/Wood_Elves | Objects= | Locations= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3532895-ss_86a55ed8cf5439c83b9d238177ef6eb1f980c1cd.1920x1080.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3532895-ss_86a55ed8cf5439c83b9d238177ef6eb1f980c1cd.1920x1080.jpg","path":"77\/776653\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_small,square_small,square_tiny,square_mini,square_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A land of chivalry and the knightly orders who nominally adhere to them, Bretonnia is one of the kingdoms of the Old World in the Warhammer Fantasy setting. It is based off of both Medieval France and Arthurian legend.

{{Location | Name=Cannabis Dispensary | Guid=3035-8095 | Deck=A cannabis dispensary is a shop that legally sells medicinal marijuana. Popular in states such as California and Colorado. | Characters=Characters/Franklin_Clinton,Characters/Lamar_Davis,Characters/Michael_de_Santa,Characters/Randy_Marsh,Characters/Steph_Gingrich,Characters/The_New_Kid,Characters/Trevor_Phillips | Concepts=Concepts/Drugs | Objects=Objects/Bong,Objects/Cigarette,Objects/Lighter,Objects/Marijuana,Objects/Water,Objects/Water_Pipe | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Colorado,Locations/Denver,Locations/KFC,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/Oregon,Locations/Portland_4416,Locations/San_Francisco,Locations/South_Park,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Ventura_County | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3496001-discount_medical_marijuana_-_2.jpg}}

Popular in states such as California and Colorado.

{{Location | Name=Cave of Wonders | Guid=3035-8301 | Deck=A cave from Disney's Aladdin with an entrance shaped like a tiger's head that holds treasure and a magic lamp with a wish-granting genie inside. | Characters=Characters/Abu,Characters/Aladdin,Characters/Carpet,Characters/Genie,Characters/Jafar | Concepts=Concepts/Arabian_Mythology,Concepts/Live_Disembodied_Head,Concepts/Magic,Concepts/Talking_Animal,Concepts/Tigers,Concepts/Trap,Concepts/Treasure_Hunting,Concepts/Vore | Objects=Objects/Diamond,Objects/Gem,Objects/Gold,Objects/Magic_Lamp,Objects/Ruby,Objects/Scarab_Beetle,Objects/Statue,Objects/Treasure_Chest | Locations=Locations/Agrabah,Locations/Cave,Locations/Desert }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3629783-aladdinandthecaveofwonders.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_tiny,scale_small,square_mini,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":"Cave of Wonders (Disney's Aladdin)"},"background":[]}' /> A cave from Disney's Aladdin with an entrance shaped like a tiger's head that holds treasure and a magic lamp with a wish-granting genie inside.

{{Location | Name=Cayman Islands | Guid=3035-7990 | Deck=The Cayman Islands is an island territory in the Caribbean Sea, associated to the United Kingdom. Its capital city is called George Town. | Characters= | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations= }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":[],"background":[]}' /> The Cayman Islands is an island territory in the Caribbean Sea, associated to the United Kingdom. Its capital city is called George Town.

{{Location | Name=Channel Islands | Guid=3035-8081 | Deck=The Channel Islands are a collection of eight islands off the coast of California located in Santa Barbara, Ventura, and Los Angeles Counties. | Characters=Characters/Abby_43250,Characters/Lev | Concepts=Concepts/Dolphin,Concepts/Fish,Concepts/Fox | Objects=Objects/Water | Locations=Locations/California,Locations/Earth,Locations/Island,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/North_America,Locations/Pacific_Ocean,Locations/Restaurant,Locations/Santa_Barbara,Locations/Santa_Catalina_Island,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Ventura_County | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3486957-channel-islands-national-park-oxnard_pc-benjamin-adobestock_167145759_e7f018298c4a7f7ebc2c8dcb801d1c37.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3486957-channel-islands-national-park-oxnard_pc-benjamin-adobestock_167145759_e7f018298c4a7f7ebc2c8dcb801d1c37.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_medium,square_small,square_mini,square_tiny,screen_medium,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Channel Islands are a collection of eight islands off the coast of California located in Santa Barbara, Ventura, and Los Angeles Counties.

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Location | Name=Chemult | Guid=3035-8364 | Deck=Chemult is an unincorporated town in Klamath County in Oregon. | Characters=Characters/Deacon_St_John | Concepts= | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Earth,Locations/Klamath,Locations/Klamath_County,Locations/North_America,Locations/Oregon,Locations/The_Milky_Way_Galaxy,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3732384-chemult%2C_oregon.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3732384-chemult,_oregon.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_small,square_small,square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar,square_mini,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Chemult is an unincorporated town in Klamath County in Oregon.

{{Location | Name=Chestnut Hill | Guid=3035-8197 | Deck=Chestnut Hill is a village in Massachusetts, a suburb of Boston, and the home of Boston College. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Boston_College_Eagles | Objects= | Locations=Locations/Boston,Locations/Massachusetts,Locations/Taco_Bell_Cantina,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/0/1992/3613806-4182501460-chest.jpg}}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3613806-4182501460-chest.jpg","path":"0\/1992\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_tiny,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,square_mini,scale_large,screen_medium,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Chestnut Hill is a village in Massachusetts, a suburb of Boston, and the home of Boston College.
